town_riverside.name: Riverside Village
town_riverside.description: A lively riverside settlement nestled between the Thornwood forest and the Silver River. The smell of fresh bread and forge-smoke mingles in the air.

forest_edge.name: Edge of Thornwood Forest
forest_edge.description: Tall oaks crowd together here. The village path behind you gives way to a carpet of fallen leaves. Shadows shift between the trunks.

forest_clearing.name: Forest Clearing
forest_clearing.description: A wide clearing breaks through the tree canopy. The ruins of a stone shrine stand at its centre, draped in moss. Something has been here recently — claw marks on the bark.

old_bridge.name: Old Stone Bridge
old_bridge.description: A crumbling stone bridge spans the Silver River. The water runs fast and cold below. A toll collector's booth stands abandoned on the far bank.

crossroads.name: Dusty Crossroads
crossroads.description: Four roads meet here. A weathered signpost points in each direction, though wind and time have worn the names away. A merchant's wagon sits abandoned nearby.

ruined_mill.name: Ruined Riverside Mill
ruined_mill.description: The old mill's waterwheel has long since rotted away. Inside, cobwebs fill every corner and the floorboards creak ominously. Something large moved across the ceiling above you.

goblin_camp.name: Goblin War Camp
goblin_camp.description: A crude camp of hide tents and sharpened stakes. Goblins chatter and argue over scraps of food. A larger tent at the centre must belong to their leader.
